description: {"description": "Leaf exhibits a textured surface with prominent venation. The leaf margin is irregularly lobed and slightly undulating. Overall leaf shape is broadly ovate."} {"description": "Numerous, small, circular to slightly irregular chlorotic spots are present. Some spots exhibit a reddish-brown center, potentially indicating necrosis. Spots are generally less than 2mm in diameter."} Lesions are distributed across the leaf surface, with a higher concentration on the lower leaf surface and along the veins. Distribution appears somewhat random, but with a tendency to follow vein patterns.
